description: Named jq filters — the Silo Context Shield. Use these instead of writing ad-hoc jq.

get_alerts.description: Find all entries where moisture > 15% (critical threshold)

check_done.description: Return true if ALL entries have status == processed

pending_only.description: Return only entries with status pending

high_moisture_summary.description: Summarize high-moisture readings with timestamp and elevator

compact_output.description: Strip internal tracing fields for final output
